description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a combination of wood paneling, white walls, and large glass windows, with a balcony and potted plants adding a touch of greenery. The ground level includes a garage with a visible car, and the upper levels have open terraces and railings. The side and rear views show a mix of solid wall sections and large, asymmetrical window openings, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The roof is flat and partially covered, with a shaded area supported by sleek columns. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on horizontal and vertical lines, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, wood and white exterior, large windows, and a garage. Features include balconies, terraces, and minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, wood paneling, large windows, balcony, and potted plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, open terrace, and a mix of window styles with some decorative wall elements.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid walls, a large black window section, and minimal decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large, asymmetrical window and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a recessed door, steps, integrated garage, and a balcony above, accented by wood paneling and glass.
